metadata.description: Model-routing patterns for Claude Code: architect-as-orchestrator with Grok 4.5 and GPT-5.6 Sol implementation lanes and a Fable 5 commitment-boundary advisor.

plugins.name: fable-orchestrator
plugins.description: Architect-as-orchestrator: your session runs Claude's most capable model, routing implementation to Grok 4.5 (Grok CLI) or GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (Codex) — modes: grok-only (default), codex-only, or mix — plus grok-researcher, cross-family cold reviewers (grok-reviewer / codex-reviewer), and a commitment-boundary advisor.
